global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with promotional elements for SnapMeal.
global.main_message: Promoting late-night meal deals from SnapMeal.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: A stylized logo for SnapMeal positioned at the top, featuring a modern font.

elements.label: Food containers
elements.description: Two abstract food containers represented by simple shapes in the center.

elements.label: Food container detail
elements.description: A detailed view of one food container, slightly larger and centered.

elements.label: Circle element
elements.description: A small circular element located below the food containers, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Hungry? We got you Late-night deals available' positioned in the center.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Late-night deals available

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Book now' at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' at the top right corner.
